plugins.name: newb
plugins.description: Talk to your newbs from Codex. Auto-discovers every newb you have access to.

plugins.name: newb-builder
plugins.description: Build and publish your own expert agent to the newb marketplace.

plugins.name: recruiting-copilot
plugins.description: Finds a candidate's standout edge, targets fitting roles, tailors their resume, and drafts recruiter outreach.

plugins.name: job-finder
plugins.description: Finds roles that actually fit you. Pulls from job boards and a curated hiring network, screens for fit against your background, and drafts tailored outreach to the people who make the call.

plugins.name: webship
plugins.description: Reviews and ships production websites — audits existing sites, and builds + deploys new ones (React + shadcn/ui) to GitHub and Vercel.

plugins.name: ymgrad-demo
plugins.description: DEMO study-abroad admissions counselor (YMGrad-style): India-anchored and honest about your real chances at US master's programs. Uses clearly-labeled fictional sample data.
